rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN S. STORPER VS. STEVEN DILLICK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Restore The Case To Active Status And Other Relief
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 21, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFF JONATHAN STORPER'S MOTION To Restore The Case To Active Status And Other Relief: Continued to December 22, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than November 26, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 21, 2014, Line 2: CLAIMANT BANK OF AMERICA'S Motion For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds: GRANTED. Moving party established its claim. No opposition filed. Request for telephonic appearance is granted. Requesting party must obtain a Court Call code from the Clerk of the Court. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA GARCIA et al VS. HOWARD OUM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Medical Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 21, 2014, Line 4: PLAINTIFFS MARIA GARCIA and DENIS GARCIA'S Motion To Quash Medical Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions: Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts regarding the scope and time frame of the records to be produced. Parties are to report to the Court of their progress at 9:30 a.m. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DLD I GROUP LLC VS. STEVEN STUART ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motions And Motions For Protective Orders And To Compel Responses To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 21, 2014, Line 7: DEFENDANT STEVEN STUART'S Motions For Protective Orders And To Compel Responses To Discovery: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to compel responses is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Motion for Protective order is DENIED. Defendant shall comply with Court's November 13, 2014 order. Request for sanctions denied. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WALLACE LEI SU VS. MARGARITA MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 21, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANT MARGARITA MARTINEZ' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication: Hearing Required to address legal issues (1) whether the premises have ever been used/rented as a boarding house; (2) whether boarding house use/tenancy has been transformed into a tenancy of a single-family unit; (3) whether premises are subject to SFRO rent increase limitations. (501/REQ)
